summary: Implemented Go SQLite storage layer using modernc.org/sqlite (no CGO) with full schema management: tables for memories, memory_links, build_meta, db_meta; FTS5 virtual table for full-text search; and triggers to keep FTS index synchronized. The Database wrapper handles connection lifecycle, bulk operation scoping (Hold/Release), and fingerprinting for stale-cache detection. Includes a RebuildDBFromJSON function that drops all tables, reloads from JSON files, and restores links.
